---
title: "corr"
generated: true
description: "Pearson correlation of variables in a tensor batch."
---

[â€ą back to `nitrix.stats.covariance`](../nitrix-stats-covariance.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:corr -->
```python
corr(X: Num[Array, '... c obs'], **kwargs) -> Num[Array, '... c c']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:corr -->
Pearson correlation of variables in a tensor batch.

All arguments forwarded to `cov`; the result is divided by
the geometric mean of the diagonal entries.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:corr -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `X` | `Num` | `...` Ă— `c` Ă— `obs` | â€” | â€” |
| `**kwargs` | `Any` | â€” | `{}` | â€” |

**Returns** `Num` â€” shape `...` Ă— `c` Ă— `c`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen perf:corr -->
:::: {.callout-note title="Benchmarks â€” nitrix-perf-bench" collapse="true"}
GPU steady-state **787.5 Âµs** (median, L4); up to **75.92Ă— faster** than `numpy.corrcoef`.  [full report](https://github.com/hypercoil/nitrix-perf-bench/blob/main/reports/PERF_CORR.md)

::: {.table-responsive}
| case | platform | param | baseline | status | steady (min/med) | compile | mem | fidelity | ratio |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| corr | jax-cpu | n=2000,t=1000 | `cupy.corrcoef` | skipped | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” |
| corr | jax-cpu | n=2000,t=1000 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 42.84 ms / 61.92 ms | 269.93 ms | 665 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.0012Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| corr | jax-cpu | n=2000,t=1000 | `numpy.corrcoef` | ok | 70.51 ms / 100.62 ms | 98.23 ms | 575 MB (rss) | âś“ 0Ă—tol | 1.65x vs nitrix-jax |
| corr | jax-cuda12 | n=2000,t=1000 | `cupy.corrcoef` | ok | 21.64 ms / 21.65 ms | 366.31 ms | 8.39 MB (hbm) | âś“ 2.8e-12Ă—tol | 27.95x vs nitrix-jax |
| corr | jax-cuda12 | n=2000,t=1000 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 774.2 Âµs / 787.5 Âµs | 553.19 ms | 111.69 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00082Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| corr | jax-cuda12 | n=2000,t=1000 | `numpy.corrcoef` | ok | 58.78 ms / 59.62 ms | 79.66 ms | 8.39 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0Ă—tol | 75.92x vs nitrix-jax |
| corr | jax-cpu | n=50,t=500 | `cupy.corrcoef` | skipped | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” |
| corr | jax-cpu | n=50,t=500 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 62.1 Âµs / 62.9 Âµs | 140.32 ms | 532 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.00056Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| corr | jax-cpu | n=50,t=500 | `numpy.corrcoef` | ok | 127.0 Âµs / 130.2 Âµs | 3.05 ms | 532 MB (rss) | âś“ 0Ă—tol | 2.04x vs nitrix-jax |
| corr | jax-cuda12 | n=50,t=500 | `cupy.corrcoef` | ok | 334.0 Âµs / 341.0 Âµs | 1.185 s | 0.10 MB (hbm) | âś“ 9.3e-13Ă—tol | 2.99x vs nitrix-jax |
| corr | jax-cuda12 | n=50,t=500 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 111.7 Âµs / 113.4 Âµs | 374.30 ms | 71.56 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00022Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| corr | jax-cuda12 | n=50,t=500 | `numpy.corrcoef` | ok | 126.3 Âµs / 128.8 Âµs | 206.5 Âµs | 0.10 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0Ă—tol | 1.13x vs nitrix-jax |
| corr | jax-cpu | n=500,t=2000 | `cupy.corrcoef` | skipped | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” |
| corr | jax-cpu | n=500,t=2000 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 6.21 ms / 9.13 ms | 150.00 ms | 542 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.00075Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| corr | jax-cpu | n=500,t=2000 | `numpy.corrcoef` | ok | 7.67 ms / 10.08 ms | 14.01 ms | 532 MB (rss) | âś“ 0Ă—tol | 1.23x vs nitrix-jax |
| corr | jax-cuda12 | n=500,t=2000 | `cupy.corrcoef` | ok | 3.71 ms / 3.73 ms | 254.04 ms | 4.19 MB (hbm) | âś“ 2.3e-12Ă—tol | 16.05x vs nitrix-jax |
| corr | jax-cuda12 | n=500,t=2000 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 231.4 Âµs / 235.1 Âµs | 481.82 ms | 83.50 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00051Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| corr | jax-cuda12 | n=500,t=2000 | `numpy.corrcoef` | ok | 8.27 ms / 30.06 ms | 87.71 ms | 4.19 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0Ă—tol | 35.73x vs nitrix-jax |
:::

*source: bench `74c2a463` Â· nitrix `fcbe94d3`*
::::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:corr -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `c` | feature channels (channels-last) |
| `obs` | *(undocumented â€” add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
